summary: End-to-end frontend testing of the Proposal for Shree romantic single-page app completed successfully. All 12 requested feature checks passed across heart → proposal → celebration stages, including music iframe id switching, evasive NO button, photo slider, Instagram send flow, mute toggle, and responsive layouts at 390px and 1440px.

stages_tested.heart_hero: PASS — data-testid 'heart-hero' present, engraved monogram shows 'A&S', hero title 'Tap the heart, my love' visible, 'open-heart-btn' clickable.
stages_tested.proposal_transition: PASS — clicking open-heart-btn transitions to 'proposal-section'; hidden-music-player iframe mounts with src containing SONG_BEFORE videoId '8xg3vE8Ie_E'.
stages_tested.love_story_card: PASS — 'love-story-card' renders with love story text.
stages_tested.photo_slider: PASS — 'photo-slider' present with all 5 dots (slider-dot-0..4); slider-next advances to photo-card-1; slider-dot-3 jumps to photo-card-3. All /photos/photoN.jpg files return HTTP 200.
stages_tested.no_btn_dodge: PASS — 'no-btn' remained in DOM and visible after 5 consecutive hover attempts. Bounding box changed on hover confirming dodge (initial {x:792.5,y:1080} → after {x:725,y:715}). Never disappeared.
stages_tested.yes_transition_and_music_switch: PASS — clicking 'yes-btn' navigates to 'celebration-section'; hidden-music-player iframe src now contains SONG_AFTER videoId 'CZy2lfqz-6s'.
stages_tested.acceptance_letter: PASS — 'acceptance-letter' contains title 'A Little Note From Me — for You, Shree' and signature line 'Yours, from the very first heartbeat — A.'
stages_tested.confetti: PASS — canvas element rendered by react-confetti on celebration screen.
stages_tested.instagram_box: PASS — 'instagram-box' visible; 'ig-message-input' textarea is prefilled with default IG message (len=104 chars) and editable; 'ig-send-btn' opens a popup to https://ig.me/m/... (redirected to instagram login), and button text changes to 'Copied — paste it to him!'.
stages_tested.mute_toggle: PASS — 'mute-toggle' appears only after music starts (post-heart-tap); aria-label toggles between 'Mute music' ↔ 'Unmute music' on click.
stages_tested.responsive_390px: PASS — no horizontal overflow at 390px on heart, proposal, and celebration stages (body scrollWidth = 390). Love story card width 350px fits viewport; YES and NO buttons render inline.
stages_tested.responsive_1440px: PASS — no horizontal overflow at 1440px on desktop (scrollWidth = 1440); layout renders as intended.

console_observations: PAGE ERROR observed (non-critical): 'this.api.isExternalMethodAvailable is not a function' — originates from the Lenis smooth-scroll library, does not affect functionality. UI and interactions work normally.
Canvas2D warning about willReadFrequently — emitted by react-confetti getImageData usage; purely a performance hint, not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: MusicPlayer.jsx: postMessage 'playVideo'/'mute' commands are timed with setTimeout(700ms) — this works but is fragile. Consider listening to YT iframe 'onReady' event via origin='https://www.youtube.com' postMessage listener for deterministic play. Not blocking.

InstagramBox.jsx: window.open is called unconditionally after clipboard write; if the user's browser blocks popups, the copy still succeeds and toast shows 'Copied! Opening Instagram' — could optionally detect null return of window.open and instruct the user. Cosmetic.

Lenis smooth-scroll library is throwing a recurring pageerror ('this.api.isExternalMethodAvailable is not a function') at every stage transition. Likely a lenis/react-remove-scroll interaction. Non-functional but pollutes console — consider updating lenis or removing if not needed.

PhotoSlider.jsx auto-advance interval (4500ms) is not paused on manual next/dot click; users clicking dot-3 will still auto-advance ~4.5s later. Consider resetting the interval on manual interaction for better UX. Non-blocking.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: First test run for this app. All flows are working. Photos exist under /app/frontend/public/photos/photo{1..5}.jpg and are served correctly. Music iframe id switching verified via src attribute. NO button never disappears — confirmed by DOM presence checks after 5 hover attempts. Only non-critical console/page errors are from the Lenis smooth-scroll library and a react-confetti Canvas2D perf warning.
